title: Multithreaded Mapper Implementation
description: The 'lib/map' directory in the Hadoop MapReduce architecture contains code for enhancing mapper performance through multithreading. The 'MultithreadedMapper.java' file implements a thread pool to execute map operations concurrently, improving throughput for non-CPU-bound tasks. It uses 'SubMapRecordReader' and 'SubMapRecordWriter' for thread-safe input/output operations. 'WrappedMapper.java' provides a wrapper around the standard Hadoop Mapper, extending its functionality via the Decorator pattern to manage custom Mapper.Context implementations. Both files rely heavily on Hadoop's MapReduce interfaces and classes, demonstrating the architectural pattern of Wrapper and Thread Pool for optimizing mapper performance.

TITLE: Multithreaded Mapper Implementation

DESCRIPTION:
The 'lib/map' directory in the Hadoop MapReduce architecture contains code for enhancing mapper performance through multithreading. The 'MultithreadedMapper.java' file implements a thread pool to execute map operations concurrently, improving throughput for non-CPU-bound tasks. It uses 'SubMapRecordReader' and 'SubMapRecordWriter' for thread-safe input/output operations. 'WrappedMapper.java' provides a wrapper around the standard Hadoop Mapper, extending its functionality via the Decorator pattern to manage custom Mapper.Context implementations. Both files rely heavily on Hadoop's MapReduce interfaces and classes, demonstrating the architectural pattern of Wrapper and Thread Pool for optimizing mapper performance.
